Innoruuk's Curse  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Lore Group: Shadowknight Epic Weapons
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 40 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +20 DEX: +15 INT: +15 HP: +60 MANA: +40
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Soul Consumption (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
Effect: Two-Handed Bash (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Innoruuk's Curse
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Lore Group: Shadowknight Epic Weapons
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 40 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +20 DEX: +15 INT: +15 HP: +60 MANA: +40
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Soul Consumption (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
Effect: Two-Handed Bash (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Light:Stein of Tears
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:zebantik
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-11-27 19:42:42
Page Updated:Wed Apr 19th, 2017

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Quests | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Dulak's Harbor
Quest Name
Shadowknight Epic 1.5 Pre-Quest

The Plane of Knowledge
Quest Name
Shadowknight Epic 1.5: Innoruuk's Voice
Shadowknight Epic 2.0: Innoruuk's Dark Blessing

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
City of Mist
Lore Group: Shadowknight Epic Weapons
  • Innoruuk's Curse
  • Innoruuk's Dark Blessing
  • Innoruuk's Voice
The innate benefit of the Innoruuk's Curse that allows you to use the bash skill while wielding these weapons is now explicitly noted as a worn effect on these items.

EverQuest ShadowKnight Epic 1.0 Innoruuk's Curse

Uploaded August 22nd, 2018 by __DEL__1765153803
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 3 4 Next »
Post Comment
New Small Scale Epics
QuoteReply
# May 02 2017 at 6:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1714954568961
6 posts
  • http://andretoulon.com/images/Epic1-1.JPG
    • ▲ Page top
    2 hander that allows you to bash
    QuoteReply
    # Aug 12 2013 at 11:12 AM Rating: Excellent
    Wizorb
    Guru
    117 posts
    Just like the Fiery Defender, this weapon allows you to bash when equipped, without the need for the AA that allows you to use bash with 2 handers.
    ▲ Page top
    Got this today!
    QuoteReply
    # Feb 08 2013 at 12:40 PM Rating: Decent
    Thantanos
    15 posts
    So I took a guildies advice. I did 1.5 prequest took 2 hours. Then I did 1.5 took 4 hours. Then I did 2.0 took 2 hours. So after being warned by all SK's I talked to I decided to do this quest for the 1.0. It took me 46 hours in a row from start to finish to get the 1.0. I did 90% of the quest in 2 hours. I camped Fear for 30 hours killed Terror got sword. Did all my turn ins then camped Lhranc in CoM (He wasnt up) for 14 hours then he spawned. One HT from a lvl 81 SK with 2100 AA's later he was dead I turned in tolken and got this 1.0 in record time! I highly reccomend following the guide on Evilgamer on this epic as it cuts out 60% of the quest (Most of the factioning and farming). For the paineel key i reccomend killing the 2 sentinels outside Erudin 6 times this took me from threatening to ally! There was only one mob that did not allow me to do a turn in with self invis or ITU. It is the ghost in the hole who spawns the undead version of himself. Fortunatly another SK was farming down there and threw one on me. This was literally the only potential sticking point i can see in your quest for this marvelous item that I love with all my heart. You can do it friends and good luck!

    81st SK
    Pyrenees
    Prexus Server
    ▲ Page top
    Just completed The Curse on Al'Kabor EQ Mac server
    QuoteReply
    # Aug 03 2011 at 12:54 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1633911677161
    1 post
    I started this quest almost 2 years ago now on Al'Kabor the Everquest Mac server. We play on an older client that is time locked in Planes of Power. I specifically play in a guild called <Vintage> and we are progressing through each expansion as it was intended to be played. We recently bested Veeshans Peak with all Kunark/classic only spells and gear and beat Kunark in just over a year.

    I unfortunately missed the boat on my Epic as the Decrepit Hide drop on our server is pre drop rate revamp. So the decrepit hide drops maybe once in ever 50 Hate Runs.

    After 2 years of waiting and hoping I have finally downed Lhranc with 25 or so Vintage Members, mostly 60s and geared out now in Sky Shrine quest armor. We took him down pretty quickly with our Wizards nuking the crap out of him and Epic mage pets beating down on him. He still drops melee like they are nothing.

    Feels good to have this finally completed. I now have this and Greenmist as an Ogre SK to cruise around with. Come check us out if you are a mac user or have a mac and want a great community of people who love this game.


    Pabts Blueribbon <Vintage>
    60th lvl Ogre Shadow Knight and proud wielder of Innoruuk's Curse

    Joban <Vintage>
    58th lvl Seeing eye Shaman

    http://www.eqvintage.com/

    Just completed The Curse on Al'Kabor EQ Mac server

    Sorry for dumb Question, but what level can I start (somewhat successfully) the SK epic?

    I just completed this quest as of 9:25 EST today on my level 49 Shadow Knight, named Gotterdammerung, on the E'ci server. I frown at Tunare.

    At level 50 :)
    ▲ Page top
    epic
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 15 2008 at 2:51 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1595176188392
    13 posts
    Wrong.
    The effect won't work until 50, but you can get epic before 50. You can start it anytime you want. The only real limit is the zone access level you might need. For instance, planes are 46 to enter. However, many epics with items from planes can be MQed.
    ▲ Page top
    epic
    QuoteReply
    # Jan 26 2011 at 10:12 AM Rating: Good
    qxx
    Sage
    277 posts
    You need to be 50, I seem to remember, for most Epic Quest NPCs to talk to you/give you rewards for turn-ins.
    ____________________________
    quarken xired | tecknoe destructo
    ▲ Page top
    epic
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 25 2011 at 10:44 PM Rating: Excellent
    WyreWintermute
    Guru
    352 posts
    Most.. not all. So far It is looking on track for level 47 (which should be fine for 46 also then).

    Scabbard - Complete
    Corrupted Ghoulbane - Complete
    Heart of the Innocent - Complete
    Will of Innoruuk -Complete
    Head of the Valiant - Complete
    Lhranc's Coin/Innoruuk's Curse - Complete

    Totally doable before lvl 50.

    Edited, Jul 28th 2011 6:40pm by WyreWintermute

    Edited, Jul 29th 2011 3:00pm by WyreWintermute

    Edited, Jul 29th 2011 3:00pm by WyreWintermute


    For any wondering minds, I'm doing this epic over again on my 2nd Shadowknight for nostalgic reasoning, he's currently level 10 & A Human Innoruuk Worshipper (LOL). MQ's went fine and he has the 4 pieces to hand in to Lhranc. However Lhranc (in iksar spirit form of course) will not take these pieces (at least he didn't eat them!). He just hands them back with the usual "I have no use for this". SO, even though it would be crazy cool to have this done at level 10 - it seems that it cannot be done before 46 I would assume. The Greenmist on the other hand can be done very early (did it also at level 10) and that was very nostalgic and fun to do all over again :)
    ▲ Page top
    wish me luck :)

    Killed Kurron Ni on Prexus a few days ago, so he still spawns. i did this step of the epic because i want to do it start to finish, not half *** it. /shrug There will always be someone who will say this weapon sucks *** and its a waste of time, but some of us want to wield the Curse...because its our FREAKING epic! and nothing out there thats bazaar bought has a better graphic than this thing. and yeah my Blade of Disruption, Edge of Envelopment and Black Bastardsword are all better than this weapon but they all have crappy graphics. /shrug its more of a prestige item now. i still think its really sad there are level 75 sk's out there without this. you guys are lazy.

    # Oct 31 2004 at 12:24 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592260908846
    45 posts
    Actually RPG games are about quests not gay quests-i dont think many can disagree that sony showed lack of imagination and effort when they created the epic quests, they were lazily done and their way of making it 'epic' was to throw stupidly long timer on spawns and make items unreasonably rare to drop. So any way of avoiding partof epic is a good thing.

    Thankfully sony realised their mstake with epic quests and put alot more thought into the new epic quests which are fun to do
    ▲ Page top
    RE: Read this i just got IC
    QuoteReply
    # Mar 03 2005 at 4:56 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1658103468262
    3 posts
    I have to disagree with you Asteldian. Back when the 1.0 epics came out they were very good quests for their time. You have to remember back then we didn't have AA's or nor the equipment or spells that are available now. Most of the epic 1.0 walkthroughs say you need full groups or raids to take down certain mobs. But you'll find comment made by players stating that isn't the case anymore. Most of the time a couple of mid 60's peeps will have taken out a mob that the walkthrough say it takes a full group or more. You have to remember that Sony has added so much to the game to make it much easier to play as to attrack new players. As far as the new epics go, I'm enjoying them just as much as I did doing the 1.0 epics.
    ▲ Page top
    RE: Read this i just got IC
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 12 2005 at 5:26 AM Rating: Default
    __DEL__1591795362173
    293 posts
    Ok Ok but still doesnt address the real brain dead crap they came up with. I am not talking about Gear , Stats, AA's, Effects. I am talking about a simple plot. Those Tards had some great funny and simple stuff back in the day. Then something happened during a span of time where they all became TARDS. Did you do the Life Leech Quest for a level 49 spell but you can only get the quest at level 50? Guess what they lowered the spell to level 47 now. YOU STILL MUST BE LEVEL 50 to get the quest!

    Now why would they lower it to level 47 you might ask yourself. Perhaps the game has out grown the spell and they felt it should be used sooner at a lower level? Maybe? Perhaps? If so who forgot to change the classic bad quest so a level 47 could get the spell? Or did they want to just lower the level to trick us all into thinking they are cool like that?

    Please we would get fired if we did stupid stuff like this at our real life jobs. Well unless we worked for some liberal, forgiving panzy like yourself.

    It is not a code thingy or buggy thingy. Someone just forgot and I am willing to bet it was the same slacker who put all that effort into the quest dialog after a few blunts.

    SLACKERS do nothing to attract new players.

    P.S.

    You did a wonderful job of typing in that whiners tone that normally gives me a headache. You give lots reasons why we should all go eazy on them and give them hugs so we all feel better.



    Edited, Tue Jul 12 06:36:19 2005

    Nerf?
    QuoteReply
    # Sep 02 2004 at 3:31 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592265665548
    19 posts
    Well I see everyone posting here that the proc is a 250 lifetap? I clicked on the link for soul consumption, it said its decreases hit points for 50 per tick? So I'm just wondering if they nerfed the proc for our epic?
    ▲ Page top
    RE: Nerf?
    QuoteReply
    # Sep 20 2004 at 11:06 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1632701888871
    5 posts
    The SK epics proc is indeed a 50pnt a tick DoT, for a total of 250pnts. The DoT then gives the life back to you at 50hps a tick. The nice thing about this is, at least that I have noticed, is that this effect stacks on itself. I have had the epic proc 2-3 time back to back, and thus I regenned 100-150hps a tick. Not too bad. Hope this helps.

    Aftr Souls
    66SK of Brell
    ▲ Page top
    sucks
    QuoteReply
    # Jun 04 2004 at 11:18 AM Rating: Default
    cybal
    99 posts
    i have a bbs blackbastard sword and i dueled a sk with his epic for kikes we had same basic stats both delfs and i won with a vengence i faster and i hit the damage and i kiked his but so i would recomend that you not get this epic untill the upgrades are availble
    ▲ Page top
    RE: sucks
    QuoteReply
    # Aug 14 2004 at 4:31 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1606090711584
    128 posts
    ok... so you're waiving your wang.... alrighty. You may want to pick up a dictionary and a thesaurus and re-educate yourself on spelling and grammar.

    This sword is a culmination of days of work. and since I cannot find a Listing for "blackbastard sword" I can only assume you are talking about the http://www.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=16735 which is the closest thing I could find. Upon review .. Innoruuk's will has better stat bonuses and a better Effect the "Black Bastardsword" has a better DPS and has AC. if it were up to me I would rather get Innoruuk's Will because it is in my opinion a better offensive weapon than the "Black BastardSword" primarily because the effect drains HPS from your opponent and gives them to you over time. The effect of the "Black Bastardsword" Increases Hate only. No Damage dealt from Proc. This means that the BBS is primarily used for MT's. Since you dueled and we have no idea about the person you dueled or the gear he was wearing or the level he was. Your reccomendation is hardly something be considered.
    Thank you for your input though. it will be duly noted on a scrap of paper in my garbage can. :-)

    Edited, Mon Aug 30 15:55:43 2004

    Quote:Innoruuk's will has better stat bonuses...

    It's Innoruuk's Curse, not will buck0h, so keep breathing.

    Oddly enough the grammar thing was at the forefront of my mind when I read that post. Definitely one of the funnier ones ive read so far.
    ▲ Page top
    RE: up grade
    QuoteReply
    # Sep 29 2004 at 2:45 PM Rating: Default
    __DEL__1591775635818
    67 posts
    I hate to be picky here guys, but his grammar was actually correct. There could be a debate as to whether there should be a comma between the words 'sword' and 'or' but to be honest that doesn't matter that much. His spelling is in need of work, however.

    If you must flame people, at least flame them for the right thing.
    ▲ Page top
    RE: up grade
    QuoteReply
    # May 20 2005 at 12:34 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591833069564
    1 post
    Q: What question is its own answer?
    A: "What question is its own answer?"

    There it is !! lol Why am i going through old posts haha
    ▲ Page top
    #REDACTED, Posted: Jan 31 2004 at 11:29 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) IMHO saying for the trouble we should get a wind-worn handblade is about retarded. A windworn is an aggro weapon, just like CHoS or Fleshgrinder, its gotta a hella fast ratio and a proc. It dosent do damage it pisses off mobs,i know i have one. SK's are not tanks by nature we are straight damage output, that is why our epic IS a 2HS and that is why it has a slower ratio then a windworn. Now I'll agree that for the difficulty/reward on 8/10 epics makes them pointless with the exception of cleric (click-stick rez, go to a tier2 raid and wipe brother, you know what i'm saying) Enchanter (cliky group haste! No more HASTE WMP from 5 people at one time anymore) Rogue (41% haste with insane ratio/stats in a primary, I'D KILL FOR ONE). Now i'm not calling anyone a moron here, but for god sakes do your homework on your class. SK's are NOT tanks, that is why our epic is NOT a WINDWORN!
    RE: windblade?
    QuoteReply
    # Aug 06 2005 at 6:13 PM Rating: Good
    __DEL__1591799842677
    View User Forum
    Scholar
    35 posts
    Your post makes absolutely no sense and is impossible to follow. Also, the argument you make about SK's not being tanks is wrong.
    ▲ Page top
    RE: windblade?
    QuoteReply
    # Jun 12 2004 at 11:39 AM Rating: Good
    __DEL__1592762199975
    322 posts
    Kngihts are actually some of the best tanks in the game, hands down. Sure, they can;t take the sheer beating a warrior can, but they hold aggro like no one's business. Not to mention, good pullers, so they can pull and tank, which is a good combo so that aggro is never juggled, AND can FD split, which is quite useful in pulling.

    Simply put, if you think Knights aren't tanks at all, your insane.
    ▲ Page top
    #REDACTED, Posted: Feb 10 2004 at 4:03 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) uhh im sure sk's (who can wear fine plate and use nearly as good items as warriors) arent good tanks (even tho they can draw MASSIVE aggro with certain spells that r made to do so) and that they are very vulnerable (especially with all their life-drawing spells and harm touch) and that warriors (where did I put my mana...?) are signifigantly better. (warriors may be able to use 2 weapons but SK'S ONLY NEED 1!!! not to mention the uber AA horse that costs all other chars besides pallies 100k) and so what if im a sarcastic jerk? im right lol!
    #REDACTED, Posted: Feb 10 2004 at 4:03 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) bleh i didnt mean fine plate, i meant plate mail in general

    Windblade 50/44 2hs, no proc, some stats.

    Wind-worn Handblade 12/18 60pt proc, some stats

    Seems like joo be comparing Epics and Oranges man.

    it used to be a lvl 1 could loot the sword off lharnc at the end but they patched it a long time ago so now he drops the thing you have to turn in for the sword
    ▲ Page top
    RE: effect lvl WRONG
    QuoteReply
    # Apr 10 2004 at 5:35 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591801678987
    344 posts
    All epics require going to the level 46+ planes, sir, to prevent nonsense like level 1's having the thing. Most of the NPCs won't even speak to you if you aren't that high, or higher in some cases.
    ▲ Page top
    RE: effect lvl WRONG
    QuoteReply
    # May 28 2004 at 1:11 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1595780782530
    View User Forum
    Scholar
    92 posts
    The offical response from Sony was that you have to be level 50 to start any epic quest. There are certain early steps you can complete on some epics like the BST epic, but most NPC's will not talk to you until your level 50. Hope that helps.
    ▲ Page top
    #iganias, Posted: Aug 07 2004 at 10:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) nice cleric on mangelo
    #REDACTED, Posted: Jan 23 2004 at 2:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) For the trouble involved of doing this quest I think Id just assume get a warmarshall staff or windblade. Stats wouldn't be quite as good, but heck of alot better delay. Melee epics just are not hardly worth doing anymore.

    #REDACTED, Posted: Mar 02 2004 at 6:07 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) there is an upgrade epic out there...its in the pop line somewere but there are new epics...noones bother to look for em though..and from what i gathered or manage to find it..it'll cost you to do it...
    READ THIS!!! I JUST GOT IC!!!
    QuoteReply
    # Nov 28 2003 at 1:45 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591796319853
    22 posts
    Hello fellow SKs!!

    Just wanted to report that i FINALLY got my epic on legends server. Ive had greenmist since level 55 and ive been working on the epic ever since. I figured I'd report that this quest is very difficult and just for all you who are reading the quest in its entirety, realize that you DO NOT NEED TO DO THE WHOLE QUEST!! You can skip Kurron Ni, that stupid 1k elixir, and the ratman guard. All you need to do is hide and TYPE /con. If he then cons indifferent hit trade and GRATZ!! you just skipped gay quest stuff!! You can also have peeps MQ stuff for you this way. Just replace hide with invis spell(after trade screen is up of course) and make sure the NPC is still indifferent. I got Soul Leech MQd to me by a RL buddy and i bought the Decrepit Hide MQ today for 50k. I know that sounds steep, but I've been to Hate 27 times and killed over 250 ashenbone drakes and not seen a single hide. I petitioned and did a /bug every time and GMs just told me it still dropped. BTW i think that the epic was way worth the money. The spinning skulls and purple glow are way badass. I plan on doing the sro LDON and buy the proc augment that does 1 second stun and 100DD(direct damage). BTW i also 1 grouped Lhranc. I was very nervous, but our group consisted of all 65s with mad AAs(except me). We almost didnt kill him, but luck shined through. And the MT was a 65cleric with 420AAs and full set of time gear hehe. Keep up the hard work and you'll get their guys )

    Destroy Everyone
    65 Dual-Epic Shadowknight,32AAs
    Minion Of Bertoxxulous

    Edited, Fri Nov 28 01:46:49 2003
    ▲ Page top
    RE: READ THIS!!! I JUST GOT IC!!!
    QuoteReply
    # May 15 2004 at 2:51 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591801678987
    344 posts

    Is this correct? This would indeed save some time and plat, if it is true.
